scripts.copy-readme: cp README.md packages/markdown-review/README.md && cp README.md packages/vscode/README.md
scripts.build: npm run copy-readme && npm run build --workspace=packages/core && npm run build --workspace=packages/web && npm run build --workspace=packages/markdown-review && npm run build --workspace=packages/vscode
scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=packages/core & npm run dev --workspace=packages/web
